div.head: 270. National Security Action Memorandum No. 165, June 16“Assignment of Additional Responsibility to the Special Group.” Confidential. 1 p. Department of State, S/P Files: Lot 69 D 121, NSAMs 62.

list.head: SUBJECT
list.item: Assignment of Additional Responsibility to the Special Group (CI)

div.p: The President has assigned to the Special Group (CI), as provided by NSAM 124, eight countries sufficiently threatened by Communist-inspired insurgency to warrant the specific interest of the Group. These countries are: Burma, Cambodia, Cameroon, Iran, Ecuador, Colombia, Guatemala, and Venezuela; and are in addition to the Group’s current responsibility for Thailand, Laos, and Viet-Nam.
